data.summary: [4/30 Temporary Maintenance Notice] There is temporary maintenance scheduled today on 4/30 (Tue). Pl
data.body:
[4/30 Temporary Maintenance Notice] There is temporary maintenance scheduled today on 4/30 (Tue). Please note that the game will be unavailable during this time. 🗓️Maintenance Period: 4/30 (Tue) 6:32 – until further notice (UTC) ➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2556982 ※ Maintenance times may change based on conditions. #BlueArchive
Our apologies for the ongoing temporary maintenance as it's taking us more time to investigate and fix the issues at hand. The estimated completion time is 4/30 (Tue) 1:00 PM (UTC), but we will make sure to notify you when the maintenance is over. [4/30 Temporary Maintenance Ended] Today's temporary maintenance has ended, Sensei. Please read the notice below regarding an issue identified after today's regular maintenance. ➡️Compensation: Pyroxene x840 (Compensation will be available in your mailbox until 5/7 (Tue) 2:59 PM UTC) ➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2556982 #BlueArchive
